projects.title: Dynamic Material Systems
projects.desc: A system of dynamic materials built using Material Parameter Collections and Blueprints to animate and control UI visuals in real time. Designed for flexibility across multiple projects with minimal overhead.

projects.title: UI Shader Toolkit
projects.desc: A collection of stylized and animated UI material functions built for diegetic and screen-space UI elements. Designed to be reusable and easily configurable by artists without shader knowledge.

projects.title: Construction Viz Materials
projects.desc: Physically based materials and shaders for real-time architectural visualization. Achieves accurate surface response and lighting realism using custom normal blending and procedural weathering.

projects.title: Procedural Function Library
projects.desc: A reusable library of procedural material functions enabling stylized and dynamic material creation across multiple projects. Reduces repetitive node work and standardizes common shader patterns.

projects.title: Master Material System
projects.desc: A master material architecture built to maintain visual consistency and reduce redundant shader variations across UI and diegetic elements. One material driving hundreds of instances.

projects.title: Material Transition System
projects.desc: An animated material system to visualize progressive building assembly and material transitions over time. Uses timeline-driven parameter animation with custom blend modes.
